---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Chalna
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

Describe the use case that motivates this feature. What problem does it solve?
Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of the proposed behavior. Include relevant API surface
changes, on-chain account layout changes, or new instructions if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternatives you have considered, and why the proposed solution is
preferred.

## Compatibility

- Does this change require a program upgrade?
- Does this change break existing scripts or keeper consumers?
- Does this change require a new account migration?

## Additional context

Links to related discussions, prior art in other Solana programs, or
specification references.
